manageContent.title: Content Management
manageContent.subtitle: Organize and manage your multimedia content elegantly and efficiently

socialMedia.title: Connect Your Social Networks
socialMedia.description: Connect your social media accounts to allow automatic content publishing. Your information will be kept secure and will only be used for the functions you authorize.

benefits.manageAll: Manage all accounts in one place

socialMedia.disclaimer: You can disconnect your accounts at any time. We will not publish anything without your permission.

disconnectModal.title: Disconnect Account
disconnectModal.explanation: This account has scheduled posts associated. To disconnect it, you must first delete these posts or force the disconnection.

blockerModal.messagePublishing: This account has publications that are currently being published. Wait for them to finish before disconnecting.
blockerModal.messageScheduled: This account has scheduled publications. You must remove them from the publications before you can disconnect this account.
blockerModal.waitForPublishing: Wait for the publications to finish publishing.
blockerModal.removeScheduled: Go to the Content section and remove these publications from the schedule.

facebook.typeRequired: You must select a post type for Facebook

instagram.typeRequired: You must select a post type for Instagram

twitter.typeRequired: You must select a post type for Twitter

youtube.typeRequired: You must select a video type for YouTube

messages.cannotDisconnectPublishing: You cannot disconnect this account while there are publications in progress
messages.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage social media accounts. Only users with 'manage-accounts' permission can connect or disconnect accounts.
